query:
INSERT INTO rebooking_batch_entry
                       (id, batch_id, sales_person_id, hours, balance_before,
                        voluntary_actual, voluntary_committed,
                        extra_hours_out_id, extra_hours_in_id,
                        created, deleted, update_process, update_version)
                   VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
